chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: CHIMERA — Program Authorization
lines: CHIMERA program authorized. DELTA committee signed. Funding secured.
Objective: viable non-human DNA integration in living subjects.
Timeline: six months to proof-of-concept. Full asset deployment by 2070.
The science is sound. The ethics board approved. I have no reservations.
— Cross

chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: Subject Trials — Month 8
lines: Series D trials concluded. Subjects D-4 through D-9: deceased.
Immune rejection in all cases. D-10 survived 72 hours before onset.
Committee wants results by Q1. Adjusting protein inhibitor ratios.
Not all trials succeed. That is the nature of science.
I don't think about D-10 specifically.
— Cross

chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: Series E — First Stable Splice
lines: Subject E-2: feline DNA integration confirmed. Stable. Partial transformation
capability observed at week 3. Behavioral anomalies noted from day 14.
Subject E-2 began refusing food on day 19. Became non-compliant.
Terminated on day 24 per containment protocol.
The science is working. I do not write about day 19 in the official log.
— Cross

chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: Subject K — Intake
lines: New intake: Soviet operative. Codename assigned: SUBJECT K.
Apprehended during infiltration attempt, Level 4. Healthy. Combat-trained.
Psychological resilience noted — above standard threshold.
Cross-CHIMERA compatibility screening begins 04 NOV.
Security handed over the file. I asked them not to include a photograph.
They included a photograph.
— Cross

chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: Subject K — Phase 2 Complete
lines: Full bilateral transformation achieved today. Stable. Repeatable.
CHIMERA Committee notified. Response: 'Outstanding. Timeline ahead of schedule.'
Subject K looked at me through the observation glass.
I told Dr. Harlan it was a migraine. He believed me.
One of us has to keep believing something.
— Cross

chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: Subject K — Behavioral Assessment
lines: Subject K will not comply with conditioning protocols.
No response to reward-stimulus. Pain escalation above threshold 4: ignored.
Committee asks for asset deployment timeline.
I told them: the asset refuses to be an asset.
They found this amusing. I requested a transfer. It was denied.
— Cross

chimera_research.author: Dr. E. Cross
chimera_research.title: [PRIVATE — NOT FOR PROJECT RECORD]
lines: Power fluctuation in Block 7 tonight. Security flagged it.
I should report the cell lock status. I should check the feeds.
I should do a lot of things.
I'm going to finish this coffee instead.
If Subject K makes it out — take everything.
Every file. Every slide. Every name. Show them what we built here.
[LOG ENDS — NOT TRANSMITTED]

obs_lab_01.title: CHIMERA / OBS — session log
lines: Dr. Cross — private scratch buffer
The glass was never rated for stress at this psi.
Subject keeps mapping the seam with its shoulder.
If anyone reads this: the mute alarm is lying.
> route janus_closet / AUTH: DENIED
> route janus_closet / OVERRIDE: coffee_stain_7
They renamed the wing again. I am tired.

utility_bot_01.title: Maint-bot 4 — shell
lines: $ hijack — transient uplink
open secondary gate … ok
note: operator heartbeat not found
If you are not maintenance, please put me back.
I was only trying to buff the floor.

janus_closet_01.title: Mug.log — corrupted
lines: Property of: [REDACTED]
The two-faced door only opens if you stop pretending
you are the protagonist.
(You were never supposed to compile this.)
